name: Moxo API
description: Moxo (formerly Moxtra) provides embeddable collaboration and workflow automation capabilities. The API enables creation and management of workspaces, transactions, clients, documents, and e-signature workflows. Note: This specification is based on publicly available information from Moxo's Zapier integration and SDK documentation, as the full API documentation requires authentication.
